title: Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD
abstract: Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD combines vector search with LLM generation for accurate, grounded answers. It handles complex queries across large document sets w...
abstract_zh: 搜索+大模型的黄金组合，Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD 做得特别扎实。不是那种"看起来很美用起来翻车"的产品，检索精度和生成质量都经得起拷问。
